NOT REPORTED. THE APPLICATION FOR COMPLEX DESIGNATION IS APPROVED. AN ORDER GRANTING COMPLEX DESIGNATION AND FOR SINGLE ASSIGNMENT TO JUDGE ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, IN DEPT. 304, FOR ALL PURPOSES IS ISSUED. A CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS SET FOR AUG-15-2025 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 304. THE SEP-10-2025 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. (D304)

CGC-25-624135. A FURTHER CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS CONTINUED TO NOV-20-2025 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 304 PER ORDER OF THE COURT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. JUDGE ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; NOT REPORTED; CLERK ED SANTOS; DEPT 304.
